description: A creamy, smoky tomato soup made by roasting tomatoes then blending with sauteed onion, garlic, broth, and basil.

ingredients.note: any small- to medium-sized tomatoes will do

ingredients.item: fine sea salt and freshly-cracked black pepper

ingredients.note: drizzle of heavy cream or olive oil, croutons, sour cream or fresh basil

steps: Heat oven to 450°F. Quarter the tomatoes and arrange cut-side-up on a baking sheet. Drizzle with 2 tablespoons olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes until softened.
Heat remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Sauté diced onion for 5 minutes, then add garlic, smoked paprika, and crushed red pepper flakes. Sauté 2 more minutes.
Add broth, basil, and roasted tomatoes with their juices to the pot and stir to combine.
Using an immersion blender, purée the soup until reaching desired texture.
Taste and season with extra salt, pepper, and/or smoked paprika as needed.
